title: Lohe Ke Haath
subTitle: Lohe Ke Haath

title: Bade Ghar Ki Beti
subTitle: Mala, a poor girl, marries the son of her father's employer. Things, however, take a turn for the worse when her father-in-law dies and his ruthless children show their true colours.

title: Bandit Queen
subTitle: Phoolan Devi, who belongs to a lower caste, faces sexual abuse and discrimination in society. A turn of events leads to her becoming the revered leader of a gang.

title: Waqt Ki Deewar
subTitle: Two brothers are separated after their mother's death. Later, one of them becomes a gangster, and the other becomes a police officer, as they find themselves at odds, unaware of their true relationship.

title: Nikaah
subTitle: Haider falls for Nilofar but she gets married to Wasim. However, things take a turn when Wasim divorces Nilofar and Haider returns in her life.

title: Santosh
subTitle: A rich woman marries a poor man but after having a child, she abandons them for her old life and remarries into wealth. Years later, her two sons from different worlds clash, their fates entwined by their mother's past decisions.

title: Nirbhay
subTitle: An innocent man faces wrongful imprisonment for murder, but years later uncovers a shocking conspiracy. Subsequently, determined to avenge his past, he embarks on a relentless quest for vengeance.

title: Itihaas
subTitle: Joginder, a police officer, and his family are put in danger when the notorious underworld kingpin, Alexander, is arrested. Upon his release, he vows revenge on those who jailed him.

title: Zakhm
subTitle: A boy, born into a family of varying religions, finds himself embroiled in communal riots. Soon, his mother's death becomes an issue raised to fulfil political agendas.

title: Tulsi
subTitle: Tulsi wants to marry Ganesh, but her father does not agree. Meanwhile, when the village matchmakers arrange for her marriage with Thakur Singh, she strives to marry the person of her choice.

title: Beti
subTitle: Sudha falls for a man but distances herself due to difficult circumstances, until fate presents her with a second chance.

title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan
subTitle: Sunil, a navy officer, falls for Anuradha. However, things get complicated when Ranjeet, Anuradha's admirer, claims that she is a single mother.

title: Hitler
subTitle: Siddhanth Sharma, a strict disciplinarian, is forced to chase hi brother, Amar, after he is accused of murder. However, his wife, Sheila, a lawyer, decides to defend Amar.

title: Aao Pyaar Karein
subTitle: A poor man gets involved with extraordinary schemes in an effort to raise money for a woman he falls in love with, so that she is rid of her debts and cured of her heart ailment.

title: Zameer
subTitle: A young man claims to be a horse-breeder's long-lost son, but all is not as it seems when he falls in love with the horse-breeder's daughter.

title: Inteha Pyar Ki
subTitle: Rohit, a multimillionaire, goes to Palampur on a business trip where he meets Tania and falls in love with her. However, they meet with an accident just before their wedding.

title: Ghar Jamai
subTitle: Dwarka, a millionaire, is impressed by Anil, a principled man, and wants him to marry Mona, his daughter. However, after their marriage, he compels him to move into his house.

title: Hasina Maan Jayegi
subTitle: Two army officers, Kamal and Rakesh, are lookalikes. Rakesh plans to kill Kamal and woo his beautiful wife Archana. However, things don't go as planned.

title: Movie
